text: The party shall indemnify the disclosing party against all claims arising from a breach of confidentiality.
This non-disclosure agreement governs the exchange of confidential information between the parties.
Termination of this agreement may occur upon thirty days written notice.
The governing law of this contract is the State of Delaware.
Confidential information includes trade secrets, business plans, and customer lists.
Force majeure events include acts of God, war, and government action.
The recipient shall not disclose confidential information to any third party without written consent.
Damages for breach are limited to the fees paid under this agreement in the preceding twelve months.
